messages.content: SELECT DISTINCT g.nationality FROM guests g JOIN bookings b ON g.guest_id = b.guest_id
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE h.hotel_id IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM amenities WHERE amenity = 'Gym')
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(email, INSTR(email, '@') + 1) as domain FROM members
SELECT DISTINCT name, stars FROM hotels
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM restaurants
SELECT DISTINCT m.category FROM menu_items m JOIN restaurants r ON m.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id WHERE r.cuisine = 'Italian'
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE release_year = (SELECT release_year FROM albums GROUP BY release_year ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT name FROM members WHERE membership_type = 'Premium' AND member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM loans)
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM restaurants ORDER BY city
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE sales > (SELECT AVG(sales) * 1.5 FROM albums)
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN genre = 'Fiction' THEN 1 END) as fiction, COUNT(CASE WHEN genre = 'Non-Fiction' THEN 1 END) as nonfiction FROM books
SELECT title, CASE WHEN genre IN ('Fiction', 'Mystery', 'Romance') THEN 'Literature' WHEN genre IN ('Science', 'History') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Other' END as broad_category FROM books
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest)
SELECT DISTINCT author FROM books WHERE book_id NOT IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews)

SELECT g.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE guest_id = g.guest_id) > 10 THEN 'Elite' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE guest_id = g.guest_id) > 5 THEN 'Preferred' ELSE 'Member' END as status FROM guests g
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM menu_items
SELECT name FROM guests WHERE guest_id NOT IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings)
SELECT DISTINCT h.country FROM hotels h JOIN bookings b ON h.hotel_id = b.hotel_id
SELECT title FROM books WHERE genre = (SELECT genre FROM books GROUP BY genre ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE restaurant_id NOT IN (SELECT restaurant_id FROM orders_rest)

SELECT name, CASE WHEN rating >= 4.5 AND price > 50 THEN 'Premium' WHEN rating >= 3.5 THEN 'Mid-range' ELSE 'Budget' END as tier FROM restaurants r JOIN (SELECT restaurant_id, AVG(price) as price FROM menu_items GROUP BY restaurant_id) m ON r.restaurant_id = m.restaurant_id
SELECT s.title FROM songs s WHERE s.album_id IN (SELECT album_id FROM albums WHERE sales > (SELECT AVG(sales) FROM albums))
SELECT m.name FROM menu_items m WHERE m.restaurant_id = (SELECT restaurant_id FROM restaurants ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT g.name FROM guests g WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE b.guest_id = g.guest_id AND h.country = g.nationality)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM loans
SELECT genre, COUNT(CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(sales) FROM albums WHERE artist_id = artists.artist_id) > 3000000 THEN 1 END) as superstars FROM artists GROUP BY genre
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE year > (SELECT AVG(year) FROM books)
SELECT m.name FROM members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT l.member_id FROM loans l WHERE l.book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews WHERE member_id = l.member_id))
SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = b.book_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id)
SELECT author FROM books WHERE year = (SELECT MAX(year) FROM books)
SELECT DISTINCT a.country FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id WHERE al.sales > 1000000
SELECT DISTINCT h.city FROM hotels h JOIN bookings b ON h.hotel_id = b.hotel_id
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE book_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT book_id FROM reviews)
SELECT DISTINCT b.genre FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id WHERE l.return_date IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders_rest o WHERE o.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id AND o.order_date >= '2023-01-01')
SELECT DISTINCT b.genre FROM books b JOIN reviews r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN price > 30 THEN 1 END) as premium, COUNT(CASE WHEN price <= 30 THEN 1 END) as regular FROM menu_items
SELECT DISTINCT r.city FROM restaurants r JOIN orders_rest o ON r.restaurant_id = o.restaurant_id
SELECT title FROM books WHERE book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM loans) AND book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM hotels
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE country IN (SELECT country FROM hotels GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10)
SELECT title FROM books WHERE year IN (SELECT year FROM books GROUP BY year HAVING COUNT(*) > 5)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT amenity) FROM amenities
SELECT DISTINCT g.nationality FROM guests g JOIN bookings b ON g.guest_id = b.guest_id WHERE b.check_in LIKE '2023%'
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE city IN (SELECT city FROM hotels WHERE stars = 5)
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM artists WHERE artist_id NOT IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM artists ORDER BY country ASC
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE a.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM artists WHERE country = (SELECT country FROM artists GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1))
SELECT DISTINCT g.name FROM guests g JOIN bookings b ON g.guest_id = b.guest_id GROUP BY g.guest_id HAVING SUM(b.total_price) > 1000
SELECT city, COUNT(DISTINCT hotel_id) FROM hotels GROUP BY city
SELECT DISTINCT r.cuisine FROM restaurants r JOIN menu_items m ON r.restaurant_id = m.restaurant_id WHERE m.category = 'Dessert'
SELECT DISTINCT join_date FROM customers ORDER BY join_date
SELECT name, rating * CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1.2 ELSE 1.0 END as performance_score FROM restaurants
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE sales > (SELECT AVG(sales) FROM albums)
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine FROM restaurants
SELECT DISTINCT g.nationality FROM guests g JOIN bookings b ON g.guest_id = b.guest_id JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.stars = 4
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE LENGTH(name) = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(name)) FROM restaurants)
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM artists WHERE genre = 'Hip-Hop'
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists ORDER BY genre
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE (SELECT SUM(total_price) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 5000
SELECT DISTINCT amenity FROM amenities
SELECT h1.name FROM hotels h1 WHERE h1.stars > (SELECT AVG(stars) FROM hotels h2 WHERE h2.country = h1.country)
SELECT DISTINCT b.author FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id WHERE l.loan_date LIKE '2023%'
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels WHERE price_per_night < 100
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE year > 2015
SELECT DISTINCT r.cuisine FROM restaurants r JOIN menu_items m ON r.restaurant_id = m.restaurant_id WHERE m.price > 100
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE release_year > (SELECT AVG(release_year) FROM albums)
SELECT DISTINCT h.city FROM hotels h JOIN amenities a ON h.hotel_id = a.hotel_id WHERE a.amenity = 'WiFi'
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > (SELECT AVG(booking_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as booking_count FROM bookings GROUP BY hotel_id))

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN release_year >= 2020 THEN 1 END) as recent, COUNT(CASE WHEN release_year BETWEEN 2010 AND 2019 THEN 1 END) as tens, COUNT(CASE WHEN release_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN 1 END) as aughts FROM albums
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM menu_items ORDER BY category
SELECT country, COUNT(CASE WHEN genre = 'Rock' THEN 1 END) as rock_artists, COUNT(CASE WHEN genre = 'Pop' THEN 1 END) as pop_artists FROM artists GROUP BY country
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE SUBSTR(email, INSTR(email, '@')) = (SELECT SUBSTR(email, INSTR(email, '@')) as domain FROM customers GROUP BY domain ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE a.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3)
SELECT loan_id, CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Returned' ELSE 'Outstanding' END as status FROM loans

SELECT b.title, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > 20 THEN 'Very Popular' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > 10 THEN 'Popular' ELSE 'Normal' END as popularity FROM books b
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM guests WHERE guest_id NOT IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings)
SELECT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE ar.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT release_year / 10) > 1)
SELECT m.name FROM members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM reviews WHERE rating = (SELECT MAX(rating) FROM reviews))
SELECT DISTINCT a.name FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id GROUP BY a.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
SELECT DISTINCT genre, year FROM books
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT genre) FROM books
SELECT name, CASE WHEN category = 'Appetizer' AND price > 15 THEN 'Large Appetizer' WHEN category = 'Entree' AND price > 40 THEN 'Large Entree' ELSE 'Standard' END as portion FROM menu_items
SELECT author FROM books WHERE LENGTH(title) = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(title)) FROM books)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels WHERE country IN (SELECT country FROM hotels GROUP BY country HAVING AVG(stars) >= 4)
SELECT name, CASE WHEN rating >= 4.5 THEN 'Excellent' WHEN rating >= 3.5 THEN 'Good' WHEN rating >= 2.5 THEN 'Average' ELSE 'Poor' END as quality FROM restaurants
SELECT DISTINCT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM albums a JOIN songs s ON a.album_id = s.album_id WHERE a.artist_id = ar.artist_id)
SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM restaurants r JOIN orders_rest o ON r.restaurant_id = o.restaurant_id WHERE o.order_date LIKE '2023%'
SELECT name, CASE WHEN price > 50 THEN 'Expensive' WHEN price > 20 THEN 'Moderate' ELSE 'Affordable' END as price_range FROM menu_items
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books ORDER BY genre
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM hotels h JOIN amenities a ON h.hotel_id = a.hotel_id WHERE a.amenity = 'Swimming Pool'
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE city = (SELECT city FROM restaurants GROUP BY city ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT author FROM books WHERE book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM loans WHERE return_date IS NULL)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels WHERE price_per_night < 80
SELECT DISTINCT rating FROM restaurants ORDER BY rating DESC
SELECT DISTINCT title FROM albums
SELECT title, CASE WHEN year >= 2020 THEN '2020s' WHEN year >= 2010 THEN '2010s' WHEN year >= 2000 THEN '2000s' ELSE 'Earlier' END as decade FROM books
SELECT g.name FROM guests g WHERE g.guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id GROUP BY guest_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.city) >= 2)
SELECT DISTINCT city, country FROM hotels
SELECT DISTINCT b.author FROM books b WHERE b.author IN (SELECT b2.author FROM books b2 JOIN reviews r ON b2.book_id = r.book_id GROUP BY b2.author HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4)
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE price_per_night = (SELECT MAX(price_per_night) FROM hotels)
SELECT title FROM books WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM loans WHERE loans.book_id = books.book_id)
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE stars = 5
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM menu_items WHERE price > 50
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE release_year = (SELECT MAX(release_year) FROM albums)
SELECT hotel_id, COUNT(DISTINCT amenity) FROM amenities GROUP BY hotel_id
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE h.country IN (SELECT country FROM hotels GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT stars) >= 3)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hotel_id) FROM bookings
SELECT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE ar.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id HAVING AVG(sales) > 500000)
SELECT DISTINCT m.name FROM members m JOIN loans l ON m.member_id = l.member_id WHERE l.return_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE price_per_night < 100
SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM restaurants r JOIN menu_items m ON r.restaurant_id = m.restaurant_id WHERE m.category = 'Appetizer'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT release_year) FROM albums
SELECT s.title FROM songs s WHERE s.album_id IN (SELECT al.album_id FROM albums al WHERE al.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM artists WHERE country IN ('UK', 'France', 'Germany')))
SELECT name, CASE WHEN price_per_night < 100 AND stars >= 3 THEN 'Excellent Value' WHEN price_per_night < 200 AND stars >= 4 THEN 'Good Value' ELSE 'Standard' END as value_rating FROM hotels
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN cuisine = 'Italian' THEN 1 END) as italian, COUNT(CASE WHEN cuisine = 'Chinese' THEN 1 END) as chinese FROM restaurants
SELECT DISTINCT city, country FROM hotels
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books GROUP BY genre HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
SELECT m.name FROM members m WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE member_id = m.member_id) > (SELECT AVG(review_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY member_id))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author) FROM books WHERE year > 2010
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine FROM restaurants WHERE cuisine IN (SELECT cuisine FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine HAVING AVG(rating) > 4)

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN check_in LIKE '%-06-%' OR check_in LIKE '%-07-%' OR check_in LIKE '%-08-%' THEN 1 END) as summer, COUNT(CASE WHEN check_in LIKE '%-12-%' OR check_in LIKE '%-01-%' OR check_in LIKE '%-02-%' THEN 1 END) as winter FROM bookings
SELECT title FROM books WHERE year > 2020 AND book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews)
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest WHERE restaurant_id IN (SELECT restaurant_id FROM restaurants WHERE rating >= 4.5))

SELECT m.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE member_id = m.member_id) > 10 THEN 'High' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE member_id = m.member_id) > 5 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END as engagement FROM members m
SELECT m1.name FROM menu_items m1 WHERE m1.price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM menu_items m2 WHERE m2.restaurant_id = m1.restaurant_id)
SELECT DISTINCT check_in FROM bookings ORDER BY check_in
SELECT DISTINCT release_year FROM albums WHERE sales > 500000
SELECT s.title FROM songs s WHERE s.album_id IN (SELECT al.album_id FROM albums al WHERE al.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM artists WHERE country = 'UK'))
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 10
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM books
SELECT DISTINCT b.genre FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id

SELECT h.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 50 THEN 'Very Popular' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 20 THEN 'Popular' ELSE 'Growing' END as popularity FROM hotels h
SELECT m1.name FROM menu_items m1 WHERE m1.price < (SELECT AVG(price) FROM menu_items m2 WHERE m2.category = m1.category)
SELECT restaurant_id, COUNT(DISTINCT item_id) FROM menu_items GROUP BY restaurant_id
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE join_date LIKE '2023%'
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists WHERE genre IN (SELECT genre FROM artists GROUP BY genre HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT country) > 1)
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE hotel_id NOT IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM bookings)

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) THEN 1 END) as prolific, COUNT(CASE WHEN artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) <= 5) THEN 1 END) as moderate FROM artists
SELECT DISTINCT s.title FROM songs s JOIN albums al ON s.album_id = al.album_id WHERE al.release_year > 2020

SELECT CASE WHEN order_date LIKE '%-12-%' OR order_date LIKE '%-01-%' OR order_date LIKE '%-02-%' THEN 'Winter' WHEN order_date LIKE '%-06-%' OR order_date LIKE '%-07-%' OR order_date LIKE '%-08-%' THEN 'Summer' ELSE 'Other' END as season, COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest GROUP BY season
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM menu_items WHERE price < 20
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM hotels WHERE country = 'France'
SELECT DISTINCT title FROM albums WHERE release_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM playlists
SELECT title, CASE WHEN year > 2020 THEN 'New Release' WHEN year > 2010 THEN 'Recent' ELSE 'Older' END as age_group FROM books

SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) > (SELECT AVG(order_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders_rest GROUP BY customer_id))
SELECT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE (SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders_rest WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > 500
SELECT name, CASE WHEN genre IN ('Rock', 'Pop', 'Hip-Hop') THEN 'Mainstream' ELSE 'Niche' END as market FROM artists
SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > (SELECT AVG(review_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY book_id))
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM hotels

SELECT c.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) > 500 THEN 'High Value' WHEN (SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) > 200 THEN 'Medium Value' ELSE 'Low Value' END as value FROM customers c
SELECT DISTINCT r1.city FROM restaurants r1 WHERE r1.rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM restaurants r2 WHERE r2.city = r1.city)
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE artist_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ar.artist_id FROM artists ar JOIN albums al ON ar.artist_id = al.artist_id JOIN songs s ON al.album_id = s.album_id)
SELECT album_id, SUM(CASE WHEN duration > 240 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as long_songs, SUM(CASE WHEN duration <= 240 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as short_songs FROM songs GROUP BY album_id
SELECT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM albums WHERE artist_id = ar.artist_id) > (SELECT AVG(album_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as album_count FROM albums GROUP BY artist_id))
SELECT DISTINCT membership_type FROM members WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com'

SELECT name, CASE WHEN customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(total) > 1000) THEN 'Big Spender' ELSE 'Regular Spender' END as spending_level FROM customers
SELECT DISTINCT m.name FROM members m JOIN loans l ON m.member_id = l.member_id
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists WHERE country = 'UK'
SELECT DISTINCT b.author FROM books b WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reviews r WHERE r.book_id = b.book_id)
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT name FROM menu_items WHERE category != 'Dessert' AND price < (SELECT AVG(price) FROM menu_items WHERE category = 'Dessert')
SELECT a1.title FROM albums a1 WHERE a1.release_year = (SELECT MIN(release_year) FROM albums a2 WHERE a2.artist_id = a1.artist_id)
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums)
SELECT DISTINCT stars FROM hotels
SELECT name FROM members WHERE member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM reviews)
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE city IN (SELECT h.city FROM hotels h JOIN bookings b ON h.hotel_id = b.hotel_id GROUP BY h.city HAVING COUNT(*) > 10)
SELECT g.name FROM guests g WHERE g.guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings GROUP BY guest_id, hotel_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT DISTINCT ROUND(price_per_night / 50) * 50 as price_range FROM hotels ORDER BY price_range
SELECT title FROM books WHERE book_id NOT IN (SELECT book_id FROM loans)

SELECT b.title, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 4 THEN 1 END) as positive, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating <= 2 THEN 1 END) as negative FROM books b LEFT JOIN reviews r ON b.book_id = r.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE year >= 2020
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cuisine) FROM restaurants
SELECT city, COUNT(DISTINCT restaurant_id) FROM restaurants GROUP BY city
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(total) > 50)
SELECT DISTINCT b.title FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id WHERE m.membership_type = 'Premium'
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE (SELECT SUM(total_price) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 10000
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN sales > 1000000 THEN 1 END) as million_plus, COUNT(CASE WHEN sales < 1000000 THEN 1 END) as under_million FROM albums
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) > 100
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM hotels WHERE stars >= 4
SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE b.book_id IN (SELECT l.book_id FROM loans l JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id WHERE m.name LIKE '%John%')
SELECT title, CASE WHEN release_year = (SELECT MAX(release_year) FROM albums) THEN 'Latest Release' ELSE 'Catalog' END as timing FROM albums
SELECT name, CASE WHEN member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM loans WHERE return_date IS NULL) THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END as status FROM members
SELECT DISTINCT r.cuisine FROM restaurants r JOIN orders_rest o ON r.restaurant_id = o.restaurant_id
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM artists
SELECT name, CASE WHEN price_per_night > 300 THEN 'Expensive' WHEN price_per_night > 150 THEN 'Moderate' WHEN price_per_night > 75 THEN 'Affordable' ELSE 'Budget' END as price_tier FROM hotels
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists
SELECT DISTINCT a.amenity FROM amenities a JOIN hotels h ON a.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.city = 'London'
SELECT title FROM songs WHERE track_number > (SELECT AVG(track_number) FROM songs)
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders_rest o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND r.cuisine = 'French')
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE (SELECT AVG(duration) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 240

SELECT a.title, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 15 THEN 'Extended' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 10 THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'EP' END as format FROM albums a
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists GROUP BY genre HAVING COUNT(*) > 10

SELECT DISTINCT m.name FROM members m WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM loans l JOIN books b ON l.book_id = b.book_id WHERE l.member_id = m.member_id AND b.author IN (SELECT author FROM books GROUP BY author HAVING COUNT(*) > 2))
SELECT DISTINCT b.author FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id WHERE l.return_date IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine, city FROM restaurants
SELECT DISTINCT a.amenity FROM amenities a JOIN hotels h ON a.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.stars = 5
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN genre = 'Fiction' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) as fiction_ratio FROM books
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM restaurants WHERE restaurant_id IN (SELECT restaurant_id FROM menu_items WHERE category = 'Appetizer')
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM restaurants)
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE h.hotel_id IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM bookings WHERE julianday(check_out) - julianday(check_in) > 7)

SELECT name, CASE WHEN stars = 5 AND price_per_night > 250 THEN 'Aligned' WHEN stars = 4 AND price_per_night BETWEEN 150 AND 250 THEN 'Aligned' WHEN stars = 3 AND price_per_night < 150 THEN 'Aligned' ELSE 'Misaligned' END as alignment FROM hotels
SELECT name FROM members WHERE member_id < (SELECT AVG(member_id) FROM members)

SELECT h.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(total_price) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 50000 THEN 'High Revenue' WHEN (SELECT SUM(total_price) FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > 20000 THEN 'Medium Revenue' ELSE 'Low Revenue' END as revenue_tier FROM hotels h
SELECT DISTINCT release_year FROM albums WHERE release_year > 2010
SELECT DISTINCT b.author FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id
SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > (SELECT AVG(loan_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as loan_count FROM loans GROUP BY book_id))
SELECT DISTINCT al.title FROM albums al JOIN artists a ON al.artist_id = a.artist_id WHERE a.genre = 'Pop'
SELECT DISTINCT g.name FROM guests g WHERE g.guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM hotels WHERE stars = 5))
SELECT g.name FROM guests g WHERE g.guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id GROUP BY guest_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.city) > 1)
SELECT r.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM menu_items WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > 5 THEN 'Diverse Menu' ELSE 'Limited Menu' END as diversity FROM restaurants r
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE city IN (SELECT city FROM restaurants GROUP BY city HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4)

SELECT name, CASE WHEN stars = 5 THEN 'Luxury Positioning' WHEN stars = 4 AND price_per_night < 150 THEN 'Value Positioning' WHEN stars = 3 THEN 'Mid-market Positioning' ELSE 'Budget Positioning' END as positioning FROM hotels
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM amenities WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) >= 5
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews WHERE rating >= 4)
SELECT name, price * CASE WHEN category = 'Entree' THEN 1.0 WHEN category = 'Dessert' THEN 0.8 ELSE 0.9 END as adjusted_value FROM menu_items
SELECT order_id, CASE WHEN order_date LIKE '%-01-%' THEN 'January' WHEN order_date LIKE '%-12-%' THEN 'December' ELSE 'Other Month' END as month FROM orders_rest
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM books ORDER BY year DESC
SELECT m.name FROM members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM loans WHERE book_id = (SELECT book_id FROM loans GROUP BY book_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1))
SELECT s.title, CASE WHEN a.sales > 1000000 AND s.track_number <= 3 THEN 'Potential Hit' ELSE 'Album Track' END as classification FROM songs s JOIN albums a ON s.album_id = a.album_id
SELECT DISTINCT email FROM customers WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com'
SELECT h1.name FROM hotels h1 WHERE h1.price_per_night < (SELECT AVG(price_per_night) FROM hotels h2 WHERE h2.city = h1.city)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM artists
SELECT booking_id, CASE WHEN total_price > 2000 THEN 'High Value' WHEN total_price > 1000 THEN 'Medium Value' ELSE 'Low Value' END as value FROM bookings
SELECT DISTINCT author FROM books WHERE genre = 'Science Fiction'
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE a.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM artists WHERE genre = 'Rock')
SELECT DISTINCT h.city FROM hotels h JOIN bookings b ON h.hotel_id = b.hotel_id JOIN guests g ON b.guest_id = g.guest_id WHERE g.nationality IN ('UK', 'France', 'Germany')
SELECT title, CASE WHEN sales > 2000000 THEN 'Platinum' WHEN sales > 1000000 THEN 'Gold' WHEN sales > 500000 THEN 'Silver' ELSE 'Standard' END as certification FROM albums
SELECT name, CASE WHEN stars = 5 THEN 'Luxury' WHEN stars >= 4 THEN 'Upscale' WHEN stars >= 3 THEN 'Mid-range' ELSE 'Budget' END as category FROM hotels
SELECT review_id, CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 'Positive' WHEN rating = 3 THEN 'Neutral' ELSE 'Negative' END as sentiment FROM reviews
SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE b.book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM reviews GROUP BY book_id HAVING AVG(rating) > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews))
SELECT loan_id, CASE WHEN return_date IS NULL THEN 'Ongoing' WHEN julianday(return_date) - julianday(loan_date) > 30 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Normal' END as duration FROM loans
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT album_id) FROM songs
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE stars = 4 AND price_per_night = (SELECT MIN(price_per_night) FROM hotels WHERE stars = 4)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) FROM orders_rest o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id WHERE r.cuisine = 'Italian'
SELECT title, CASE WHEN duration > 300 THEN 'Long' WHEN duration > 180 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Short' END as length FROM songs
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM hotels ORDER BY city
SELECT title FROM books b1 WHERE year > (SELECT AVG(year) FROM books b2 WHERE b2.genre = 'Fiction')

SELECT b.title, CASE WHEN (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id) >= 4 THEN 'Excellent' WHEN (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id) >= 3 THEN 'Good' ELSE 'Fair' END as quality FROM books b
SELECT DISTINCT b.title FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT artist_id) FROM albums
SELECT name FROM members WHERE member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM loans WHERE return_date IS NULL)
SELECT name FROM members WHERE SUBSTR(email, INSTR(email, '@')) = (SELECT SUBSTR(email, INSTR(email, '@')) as domain FROM members GROUP BY domain ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT name FROM members WHERE member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM loans)
SELECT DISTINCT category, ROUND(price) as price_range FROM menu_items

SELECT booking_id, CASE WHEN julianday(check_out) - julianday(check_in) > 7 THEN 'Extended Stay' WHEN julianday(check_out) - julianday(check_in) > 3 THEN 'Standard Stay' ELSE 'Short Stay' END as stay_type FROM bookings
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM hotels
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels
SELECT author FROM books WHERE year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM books)

SELECT b.title, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > 10 THEN 'Well Reviewed' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE book_id = b.book_id) > 0 THEN 'Some Reviews' ELSE 'No Reviews' END as review_status FROM books b
SELECT name, price_per_night * CASE WHEN city IN ('Paris', 'Rome') THEN 1.3 ELSE 1.0 END as adjusted_price FROM hotels
SELECT name, CASE WHEN country IN ('France', 'Italy', 'Spain') THEN 'Top European Destination' WHEN country IN ('USA', 'UK') THEN 'Major Market' ELSE 'Emerging Market' END as market_tier FROM hotels

SELECT a.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(sales) FROM albums WHERE artist_id = a.artist_id) > 5000000 THEN 'Superstar' WHEN (SELECT SUM(sales) FROM albums WHERE artist_id = a.artist_id) > 2000000 THEN 'Popular' ELSE 'Emerging' END as status FROM artists a
SELECT DISTINCT title, release_year FROM albums
SELECT m.name FROM menu_items m WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM restaurants r WHERE r.restaurant_id = m.restaurant_id AND r.cuisine = 'Chinese')
SELECT cuisine, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 END) as high_rated_count FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM artists ORDER BY country
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels ORDER BY country
SELECT DISTINCT g.name FROM guests g WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE b.guest_id = g.guest_id AND h.stars >= 4)
SELECT DISTINCT b.genre FROM books b JOIN reviews r ON b.book_id = r.book_id GROUP BY b.genre HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest WHERE SUBSTR(order_date, 1, 4) = SUBSTR(c.join_date, 1, 4))
SELECT DISTINCT author FROM books GROUP BY author HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
SELECT title, CASE WHEN year >= 2020 THEN 'Recent' WHEN year >= 2000 THEN 'Modern' WHEN year >= 1980 THEN 'Contemporary' ELSE 'Classic' END as era FROM books
SELECT title, CASE WHEN track_number = 1 THEN 'Opening Track' WHEN track_number <= 5 THEN 'Early Track' ELSE 'Later Track' END as position FROM songs
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE city = (SELECT city FROM hotels GROUP BY city ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT amenity FROM amenities WHERE amenity IN (SELECT amenity FROM amenities GROUP BY amenity ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5)
SELECT DISTINCT author, genre FROM books
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM hotels GROUP BY country HAVING AVG(price_per_night) < 150
SELECT a.title FROM albums a WHERE (SELECT SUM(duration) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 3600
SELECT DISTINCT a.country FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id WHERE al.sales > 1000000
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM amenities WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id) > (SELECT AVG(amenity_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as amenity_count FROM amenities GROUP BY hotel_id))
SELECT DISTINCT name, cuisine FROM restaurants
SELECT title FROM books WHERE genre IN (SELECT genre FROM books GROUP BY genre HAVING COUNT(*) > 10)

SELECT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_items WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > (SELECT AVG(item_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as item_count FROM menu_items GROUP BY restaurant_id))
SELECT title FROM books WHERE book_id = (SELECT book_id FROM reviews GROUP BY book_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT title FROM albums WHERE sales = (SELECT MAX(sales) FROM albums)

SELECT DISTINCT city FROM hotels WHERE stars = 5
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT genre) FROM artists
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE country IN (SELECT country FROM artists GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT name FROM guests WHERE nationality = (SELECT nationality FROM guests GROUP BY nationality ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT title FROM songs WHERE album_id = (SELECT album_id FROM albums ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE country = 'France'
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM restaurants WHERE cuisine = 'Chinese'
SELECT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM menu_items WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) >= 4
SELECT title FROM books WHERE genre = (SELECT genre FROM books GROUP BY genre ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM restaurants WHERE cuisine = 'Italian'
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine FROM restaurants WHERE rating > 4
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest GROUP BY customer_id HAVING AVG(total) > (SELECT AVG(total) FROM orders_rest))
SELECT name, CASE WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.com' THEN 'Gmail' WHEN email LIKE '%@yahoo.com' THEN 'Yahoo' ELSE 'Other' END as provider FROM members
SELECT title FROM books WHERE genre = (SELECT b.genre FROM books b JOIN reviews r ON b.book_id = r.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id ORDER BY AVG(r.rating) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM reviews WHERE rating = 5

SELECT album_id, COUNT(DISTINCT song_id) FROM songs GROUP BY album_id
SELECT member_id, COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) as unique_books FROM loans GROUP BY member_id
SELECT genre, COUNT(DISTINCT artist_id) FROM artists GROUP BY genre
SELECT DISTINCT nationality, name FROM guests
SELECT name FROM guests WHERE nationality = 'USA'
SELECT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE ar.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums WHERE release_year > 2020)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) FROM reviews
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders_rest)
SELECT DISTINCT a.amenity FROM amenities a JOIN hotels h ON a.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE h.city = 'Paris'
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE genre = (SELECT genre FROM artists GROUP BY genre ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE city = 'New York' AND rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM restaurants WHERE city = 'New York')
SELECT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM menu_items WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > 3
SELECT DISTINCT r.city FROM restaurants r JOIN orders_rest o ON r.restaurant_id = o.restaurant_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.join_date LIKE '2023%'

SELECT DISTINCT country FROM artists WHERE country IN (SELECT country FROM artists GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT genre) > 1)

SELECT genre, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artists) as market_share, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artists) > 20 THEN 'Major Genre' ELSE 'Minor Genre' END as significance FROM artists GROUP BY genre
SELECT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM amenities WHERE hotel_id = h.hotel_id AND amenity = 'Room Service')

SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE cuisine = 'Italian' AND rating >= 4
SELECT city, COUNT(DISTINCT restaurant_id) FROM restaurants GROUP BY city
SELECT name FROM restaurants WHERE city IN (SELECT city FROM restaurants GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT name, CASE WHEN category IN ('Appetizer', 'Salad') THEN 'Starter' WHEN category IN ('Entree', 'Main') THEN 'Main Course' ELSE 'Other' END as meal_type FROM menu_items

SELECT title, CASE WHEN release_year >= 2020 THEN '2020s' WHEN release_year >= 2010 THEN '2010s' WHEN release_year >= 2000 THEN '2000s' WHEN release_year >= 1990 THEN '1990s' ELSE 'Earlier' END as decade FROM albums
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders_rest o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id HAVING SUM(o.total) > 100

SELECT r.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > 50 THEN 'Very Popular' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest WHERE restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id) > 20 THEN 'Popular' ELSE 'Growing' END as popularity FROM restaurants r

SELECT g.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.city) FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE b.guest_id = g.guest_id) > 5 THEN 'Diverse Traveler' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.city) FROM bookings b JOIN hotels h ON b.hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE b.guest_id = g.guest_id) > 2 THEN 'Multi-City Traveler' ELSE 'Single-City Traveler' END as travel_pattern FROM guests g
SELECT title, CASE WHEN sales > (SELECT AVG(sales) FROM albums) * 2 THEN 'Highly Successful' WHEN sales > (SELECT AVG(sales) FROM albums) THEN 'Successful' ELSE 'Moderate' END as success FROM albums

SELECT a.title, CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(duration) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 3600 THEN 'Long Album' WHEN (SELECT SUM(duration) FROM songs WHERE album_id = a.album_id) > 2400 THEN 'Standard Album' ELSE 'Short Album' END as length FROM albums a

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings GROUP BY guest_id HAVING SUM(total_price) > 3000) THEN 1 END) as high_spenders, COUNT(CASE WHEN guest_id NOT IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings GROUP BY guest_id HAVING SUM(total_price) > 3000) THEN 1 END) as others FROM guests

SELECT c.name, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) >= 20 THEN 'Frequent' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_rest WHERE customer_id = c.customer_id) >= 10 THEN 'Regular' ELSE 'Occasional' END as frequency FROM customers c

SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE price_per_night > (SELECT AVG(price_per_night) FROM hotels)

SELECT title, CASE WHEN release_year > 2020 THEN 'Latest' WHEN release_year > 2015 THEN 'Recent' WHEN release_year > 2010 THEN 'Somewhat Recent' ELSE 'Older' END as age FROM albums

SELECT name, CASE WHEN join_date >= '2023-01-01' THEN 'New Customer' WHEN join_date >= '2020-01-01' THEN 'Regular Customer' ELSE 'Long-time Customer' END as customer_type FROM customers

SELECT name FROM members WHERE membership_type = 'Basic' AND member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM reviews WHERE rating = 5)
SELECT name, CASE WHEN genre IN ('Rock', 'Metal', 'Punk') THEN 'Rock Family' WHEN genre IN ('Pop', 'Dance') THEN 'Pop Family' ELSE 'Other' END as genre_family FROM artists

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.com' THEN 1 END) as gmail, COUNT(CASE WHEN email LIKE '%@yahoo.com' THEN 1 END) as yahoo FROM customers
SELECT b.title, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM loans WHERE book_id = b.book_id AND return_date IS NULL) THEN 'Checked Out' ELSE 'Available' END as availability FROM books b
SELECT DISTINCT release_year FROM albums ORDER BY release_year DESC
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE artist_id NOT IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums)
SELECT title FROM books WHERE book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM loans GROUP BY book_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM artists WHERE genre = 'Rock'

SELECT b.title FROM books b WHERE b.book_id IN (SELECT r.book_id FROM reviews r WHERE r.rating > (SELECT AVG(r2.rating) FROM reviews r2 JOIN books b2 ON r2.book_id = b2.book_id WHERE b2.genre = b.genre))
SELECT name, CASE WHEN stars >= 4 AND price_per_night > 200 THEN 'Luxury' WHEN stars >= 3 AND price_per_night > 100 THEN 'Business' ELSE 'Leisure' END as segment FROM hotels
SELECT name FROM hotels WHERE city IN (SELECT city FROM hotels GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT DISTINCT ar.genre FROM artists ar WHERE ar.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums WHERE sales > 2000000)
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM hotels h WHERE h.hotel_id IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM amenities WHERE amenity = 'Swimming Pool')
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists WHERE country = 'USA'
SELECT r1.name FROM restaurants r1 WHERE r1.rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM restaurants r2 WHERE r2.cuisine = r1.cuisine)
SELECT DISTINCT author, year FROM books
SELECT DISTINCT ar.name FROM artists ar WHERE ar.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM albums WHERE sales > 1000000)
SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM restaurants r WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM menu_items m WHERE m.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id AND m.category = 'Dessert')
SELECT DISTINCT al.release_year FROM albums al JOIN artists a ON al.artist_id = a.artist_id WHERE a.genre = 'Rock'
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM artists WHERE country IN ('UK', 'France', 'Germany')
SELECT DISTINCT m.membership_type FROM members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM reviews)
SELECT DISTINCT author FROM books WHERE genre = 'Fiction'
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM books WHERE genre = 'Mystery'
SELECT DISTINCT m.name FROM members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT l.member_id FROM loans l JOIN books b ON l.book_id = b.book_id WHERE b.genre = 'Fiction')
SELECT name FROM artists WHERE country = (SELECT country FROM artists GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT year / 10 * 10 as decade, COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) FROM books GROUP BY decade
SELECT name FROM menu_items WHERE price > (SELECT MIN(price) FROM menu_items WHERE category = 'Entree')
SELECT name, CASE WHEN country IN ('USA', 'Canada') THEN 'North America' WHEN country IN ('UK', 'France', 'Germany') THEN 'Europe' ELSE 'Other' END as region FROM artists
SELECT hotel_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN amenity IN ('WiFi', 'Parking', 'Breakfast') THEN 1 END) as essential_amenities FROM amenities GROUP BY hotel_id

SELECT a1.title FROM albums a1 JOIN artists ar1 ON a1.artist_id = ar1.artist_id WHERE a1.release_year >= (SELECT AVG(a2.release_year) FROM albums a2 JOIN artists ar2 ON a2.artist_id = ar2.artist_id WHERE ar2.genre = ar1.genre)
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM menu_items
SELECT DISTINCT g.name FROM guests g WHERE g.guest_id IN (SELECT guest_id FROM bookings WHERE hotel_id IN (SELECT hotel_id FROM hotels WHERE city = 'Paris'))
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders_rest o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
SELECT DISTINCT a.genre FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id
SELECT DISTINCT a.country FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id GROUP BY a.country HAVING AVG(al.sales) > 500000
SELECT DISTINCT a.genre FROM artists a JOIN albums al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id WHERE al.release_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
SELECT h1.name FROM hotels h1 WHERE h1.stars > (SELECT AVG(stars) FROM hotels h2 WHERE h2.country = h1.country)
SELECT DISTINCT name, membership_type FROM members
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders_rest
SELECT s1.title FROM songs s1 WHERE s1.duration > (SELECT AVG(duration) FROM songs s2 WHERE s2.album_id = s1.album_id)
